creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Apr  6 05:47:50 2014
New Revision: 350308
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350308
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350308/

Log:
  - Update to 4.1.0
  - While I'm here:
    - Remove deprecated PTHREAD_*
    - Strip shared library
  
  Changes:	http://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/osip.git/tree/ChangeLog
  PR:		188107
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net/libosip2/Makefile
  head/net/libosip2/distinfo
  head/net/libosip2/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net/libosip2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/libosip2/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:45 2014	(r350307)
+++ head/net/libosip2/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:50 2014	(r350308)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	libosip2
-PORTVERSION=	4.0.0
+PORTVERSION=	4.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	GNU/osip
 
@@ -16,7 +16,9 @@ USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 USES=		pathfix pkgconfig
 
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|-pthread|${PTHREAD_LIBS}|g" ${WRKSRC}/configure
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "/^SUBDIRS/s| help | |g" ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
 
+post-install:
+	${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/libosip2.so.11 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/libosipparser2.so.11
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net/libosip2/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/libosip2/distinfo	Sun Apr  6 05:47:45 2014	(r350307)
+++ head/net/libosip2/distinfo	Sun Apr  6 05:47:50 2014	(r350308)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (libosip2-4.0.0.tar.gz) = bb2d228a41750fab397480002b0865f305f83a3840b1aa84851593593491b015
-SIZE (libosip2-4.0.0.tar.gz) = 644958
+SHA256 (libosip2-4.1.0.tar.gz) = 996aa0363316a871915b6f12562af53853a9962bb93f6abe1ae69f8de7008504
+SIZE (libosip2-4.1.0.tar.gz) = 636382

Modified: head/net/libosip2/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/net/libosip2/pkg-plist	Sun Apr  6 05:47:45 2014	(r350307)
+++ head/net/libosip2/pkg-plist	Sun Apr  6 05:47:50 2014	(r350308)
@@ -44,11 +44,11 @@ include/osipparser2/sdp_message.h
 lib/libosip2.a
 lib/libosip2.la
 lib/libosip2.so
-lib/libosip2.so.10
+lib/libosip2.so.11
 lib/libosipparser2.a
 lib/libosipparser2.la
 lib/libosipparser2.so
-lib/libosipparser2.so.10
+lib/libosipparser2.so.11
 libdata/pkgconfig/libosip2.pc
 @dirrm include/osipparser2/headers
 @dirrm include/osipparser2
